installCommand: echo 'skip: 报告构建只读 .niceeval/ 与 reports/,不碰本仓库 node_modules'
buildCommand: mkdir -p /tmp/niceeval-build && cd /tmp/niceeval-build && npm init -y >/dev/null && npm i --no-audit --no-fund niceeval@latest react react-dom && ln -sfn /tmp/niceeval-build/node_modules "$OLDPWD/node_modules" && cd "$OLDPWD" && node_modules/.bin/niceeval view --results .niceeval --report reports/memory.tsx --out site --allow-sensitive-artifacts
